title: How Long Does It Take to Improve Sleep After 40? A Week-by-Week Guide
author: Happy Aging Team
primary_keyword: how long to improve sleep after 40
meta_title: How Long Does It Take to Improve Sleep After 40? A Week-by-Week Guide
meta_description: Wondering how long to improve sleep after 40? This week-by-week guide explains what changes first, why hormones disrupt sleep, and how to get deeper rest faster.
